title: Blox Block Definition
description: Schema for a BLOX block file. The root object stores the definition, optional schema metadata, and checkpoint records.

dependencyVersion.description: A dependency version requirement. Use either a single version number or a [minVersion, maxVersion] range.

oneOf.description: Inclusive version range expressed as [minVersion, maxVersion].

checkpoint.description: A saved checkpoint for a block or template, keyed by an arbitrary checkpoint name.

commit.description: The commit hash that identifies the checkpoint snapshot.

branch.description: Optional branch name associated with the checkpoint.

schemaVersion.description: Optional BLOX schema version for this file.

version.description: Optional major version for the block definition.

bases.description: Optional list of base templates that this block extends.

name.description: The name of the base template.

ignore.description: File patterns to ignore when initializing or updating the block.

init.description: Command to run after the block is initialized or added.

add.description: Command to run when this block is added to a project.

update.description: Command to run when this block is updated.

remove.description: Command to run when this block is removed.

templates.description: Templates that this block depends on.

name.description: The name of the template dependency.

dependencies.description: Other blocks that this block depends on.

name.description: The name of the block dependency.

checkpoints.description: Checkpoint records keyed by checkpoint name.

project.description: Optional project-level settings for the BLOX file.
